ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., ADBE, ALL) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company (e.g., Adobe Inc, Allstate Corp) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the stock price (e.g., USD) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_long" TEXT /* Long name of the stock exchange (e.g., NASDAQ Stock Exchange) */,
  "exchange_short" TEXT /* Short name of the stock exchange (e.g., NASDAQ) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange (e.g., EDT) */,
  "timezone_name" TEXT /* Name of the timezone (e.g., America/New_York) */,
  "gmt_offset" INTEGER /* GMT offset of the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stock exchange */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "price" REAL /* Current stock price */,
  "price_open" REAL /* Opening stock price for the day */,
  "day_high" REAL /* Highest stock price for the day */,
  "day_low" REAL /* Lowest stock price for the day */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* Highest stock price in the last 52 weeks */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* Lowest stock price in the last 52 weeks */,
  "day_change" REAL /* Change in stock price from the previous day */,
  "change_pct" REAL /* Percentage change in stock price from the previous day */,
  "close_yesterday" REAL /* Closing stock price for the previous day */,
  "last_trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last trade */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the specific stock price record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock volume record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Current trading volume */,
  "volume_avg" REAL /* Average trading volume */,
  "volume_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading volume record */,
  "volume_avg_days" INTEGER /* Number of days used for calculating the average volume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_volumes_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_capitalization" (
  "market_cap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market capitalization record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Current market capitalization */,
  "market_cap_date" TEXT /* Date of the market capitalization record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_cap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_capitalization_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange listing */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was listed on the exchange */,
  "delisting_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was delisted (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_listings_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_listings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
